description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Update Docker images that can be triggered manually or on a weekly schedule. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build Docker images for multiple architectures and distributions, including both standard and Lite AppImage builds for bionic on x86_64, i386, arm64, and armhf. For each build, checkout the repository, set up QEMU integration for Docker, and then build and upload the Docker image using a provided bash script and credentials from secrets.
